summary: Limited info on sound quality; reviewers note the show was part of the Dylan tour opening slot
review: The sole review focuses on the concert’s place in the Dylan‑Petty tour rather than musical or recording details, offering a neutral to mildly positive view with a 4‑star rating. No comments are made about audio fidelity, performance nuances, or standout songs.
